title: Phase 1 validate-before-write for space_set member patches worth defending
description: The validate_member_patch Phase 1 pass before any store writes is the correct pattern. A future contributor might suggest 'why not validate inline with apply_member_patch?' — the inline approach is exactly the original bug: update_space_props wrote the name before apply_member_patch checked the role, leaving a partial write on input errors. VALID_ROLES as a single constant (now replaced by SpaceRole enum) was the right first step toward centralizing role validation.
